rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 03, 2016 line 3. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt. continued to November 17, 2016. Moving party to provide competent evidence of Mr. Mohanna's non-compliance with this Court's order by November 10, 2016. Mr. Mohanna to file a response to OSC for failure to comply with this Court's order no later than November 15, 2016. Mr. Mohanna is ordered to appear on November 17, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501 (400 McAllister Street, San Francisco, CA 94102). Mr. Mohanna has been served with OSC and has knowledge of the hearings as evidenced by proposed order submitted by Mr. Mohanna re: October 17, 2016 hearing. = (501/REQ)
